initiatives.name: Chainbreaker Collective
initiatives.description: Economic and environmental justice organization building power through mutual aid, direct action, and organizing for housing justice and transportation equity in Santa Fe's working-class communities of color.

initiatives.name: SURJ Northern New Mexico
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Northern New Mexico. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.
